details.question: 银行共有多少个活跃账户？
details.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM accounts WHERE status = 'active'
details.generated_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM accounts WHERE status = 'active'

details.question: 列出所有支行名称和所在城市
哪个账户余额最高？
details.gold_sql: SELECT holder_name, balance FROM accounts ORDER BY balance DESC LIMIT 1
details.generated_sql: SELECT holder_name, balance FROM accounts ORDER BY balance DESC LIMIT 1

details.question: 所有账户的总余额是多少？
details.gold_sql: SELECT SUM(balance) AS total_balance FROM accounts
details.generated_sql: SELECT SUM(balance) AS total_balance FROM accounts

details.question: 每个支行有多少个账户？
details.gold_sql: SELECT b.branch_name, COUNT(*) AS account_count FROM accounts a JOIN branches b ON a.branch_id = b.branch_id GROUP BY b.branch_name
details.generated_sql: SELECT b.branch_name, COUNT(*) AS account_count FROM accounts a JOIN branches b ON a.branch_id = b.branch_id GROUP BY b.branch_name

details.question: 各账户类型的平均余额分别是多少？
details.gold_sql: SELECT account_type, AVG(balance) AS avg_balance FROM accounts GROUP BY account_type
details.generated_sql: SELECT account_type, AVG(balance) AS avg_balance FROM accounts GROUP BY account_type

details.question: 2024年1月通过手机渠道的消费总金额是多少？
details.gold_sql: SELECT SUM(amount) AS total FROM transactions WHERE txn_type = '消费' AND channel = '手机' AND txn_date BETWEEN '2024-01-01' AND '2024-01-31'
details.generated_sql: SELECT SUM(amount) AS total FROM transactions WHERE txn_type = '消费' AND channel = '手机' AND txn_date BETWEEN '2024-01-01' AND '2024-01-31'

details.question: 按交易渠道统计交易笔数和总金额
details.gold_sql: SELECT channel, COUNT(*) AS txn_count, SUM(amount) AS total_amount FROM transactions GROUP BY channel
details.generated_sql: SELECT channel, COUNT(*) AS txn_count, SUM(amount) AS total_amount FROM transactions GROUP BY channel

details.question: 查询每个账户的交易总金额排名
details.gold_sql: SELECT a.holder_name, SUM(t.amount) AS total_txn FROM accounts a JOIN transactions t ON a.account_id = t.account_id GROUP BY a.account_id, a.holder_name ORDER BY total_txn DESC
details.generated_sql: SELECT a.holder_name, SUM(t.amount) AS total_txn FROM accounts a JOIN transactions t ON a.account_id = t.account_id GROUP BY a.account_id, a.holder_name ORDER BY total_txn DESC

details.question: 查询有逾期还款记录的贷款
details.gold_sql: SELECT l.loan_id, a.holder_name, l.loan_type, l.principal, lp.payment_date FROM loans l JOIN accounts a ON l.account_id = a.account_id JOIN loan_payments lp ON l.loan_id = lp.loan_id WHERE lp.is_overdue = 1
details.generated_sql: SELECT l.loan_id, a.holder_name, l.loan_type, l.principal, lp.payment_date FROM loans l JOIN accounts a ON l.account_id = a.account_id JOIN loan_payments lp ON l.loan_id = lp.loan_id WHERE lp.is_overdue = 1

details.question: 各支行的贷款总额和平均利率分别是多少？
details.gold_sql: SELECT b.branch_name, SUM(l.principal) AS total_principal, AVG(l.interest_rate) AS avg_rate FROM branches b JOIN accounts a ON b.branch_id = a.branch_id JOIN loans l ON a.account_id = l.account_id GROUP BY b.branch_name
details.generated_sql: SELECT b.branch_name, SUM(l.principal) AS total_principal, AVG(l.interest_rate) AS avg_rate FROM branches b JOIN accounts a ON b.branch_id = a.branch_id JOIN loans l ON a.account_id = l.account_id GROUP BY b.branch_name

details.question: 列出所有状态为逾期的贷款及其持有人
details.gold_sql: SELECT a.holder_name, l.loan_type, l.principal, l.status FROM loans l JOIN accounts a ON l.account_id = a.account_id WHERE l.status = 'overdue'
details.generated_sql: SELECT a.holder_name, l.loan_type, l.principal, l.status FROM loans l JOIN accounts a ON l.account_id = a.account_id WHERE l.status = 'overdue'

details.question: 找出余额低于5000但有活跃贷款的账户
details.gold_sql: SELECT a.holder_name, a.balance, l.loan_type, l.principal FROM accounts a JOIN loans l ON a.account_id = l.account_id WHERE a.balance < 5000 AND l.status = 'active'
details.generated_sql: SELECT a.holder_name, a.balance, l.loan_type, l.principal FROM accounts a JOIN loans l ON a.account_id = l.account_id WHERE a.balance < 5000 AND l.status = 'active'

details.question: 统计每个客户2024年1月和2月的消费金额对比
details.gold_sql: SELECT a.holder_name, SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(t.txn_date) = 1 THEN t.amount ELSE 0 END) AS jan_spending, SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(t.txn_date) = 2 THEN t.amount ELSE 0 END) AS feb_spending FROM accounts a JOIN transactions t ON a.account_id = t.account_id WHERE t.txn_type = '消费' AND YEAR(t.txn_date) = 2024 GROUP BY a.account_id, a.holder_name
details.generated_sql: SELECT a.holder_name, SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(t.txn_date) = 1 THEN t.amount ELSE 0 END) AS jan_spending, SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(t.txn_date) = 2 THEN t.amount ELSE 0 END) AS feb_spending FROM accounts a JOIN transactions t ON a.account_id = t.account_id WHERE t.txn_type = '消费' AND YEAR(t.txn_date) = 2024 GROUP BY a.account_id, a.holder_name

details.question: 各贷款类型的数量和总金额
details.gold_sql: SELECT loan_type, COUNT(*) AS loan_count, SUM(principal) AS total_principal FROM loans GROUP BY loan_type
details.generated_sql: SELECT loan_type, COUNT(*) AS loan_count, SUM(principal) AS total_principal FROM loans GROUP BY loan_type
